channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Justin Thomas makes two late birdies to restore his lead at Hilton Head
item.description: HILTON HEAD ISLAND, S.C. (AP) — Justin Thomas made a pair of birdies on the crusty, breezy back nine at Harbour Town to salvage a 2-under 69 for a two-shot lead Friday at the RBC Heritage, his first 36-hole lead in more than four years.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How can the San Jose Sharks improve? Mike Grier talks offseason priorities
item.description: San Jose Sharks GM Mike Grier on last-place finish: "I hope not to be in this situation for a while after this year.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Michigan State lands Samford transfer SG Trey Fort
item.description: Michigan State basketball has landed its second transfer portal commitment in Samford shooting guard Trey Fort.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Hall, Local 4

item.title: Inside the numbers: Led by Cleveland and Oklahoma City, it was the season of the streak in the NBA
item.description: It was the year of the long winning streak in the NBA. There were five instances of teams winning 11 or more games in a row — three by Cleveland, two by Oklahoma City, and it's probably no coincidence that those two teams are the ones that earned No.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kamala Harris paid LeBron James' entertainment company $50,000 for 'campaign event production,' records show
item.description: LeBron James endorsed Kamala Harris for president before the election, and the campaign paid his entertainment company $50,000 in January.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PWHL chooses Vancouver as 1st expansion city with 2nd market to be determined, AP source says
item.description: The PWHL’s first expansion team will be based in Vancouver with an announcement scheduled for next week, a person with knowledge of the decision confirmed to The Associated Press on Friday. The person spoke on the condition of anonymity because the league has not revealed its plans.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ben Shelton and Alexander Zverev advance to Munich semifinals
item.description: MUNICH (AP) — Ben Shelton advanced to his second clay-court semifinals by beating Luciano Darderi 6-4, 6-3 at the BMW Open on Friday. The American, who won the Houston title on clay a year ago, hit 29 winners to Darderi's 12 in chilly temperatures in Bavaria. Shelton, the No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LA is betting central with money on the Lakers and Clippers as the NBA playoffs begin
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Lakers often attract large betting interest anyway, but the controversial midseason trade that landed Luka Doncic from Dallas has people emptying their bank accounts to put money on Los Angeles. And the money, mostly fueled by casual bettors, is still coming.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts Toronto FC with new era potentially dawning
item.description: Saturday night at America First Field might be about more than just the soccer. As Real Salt Lake gets set to host Toronto FC, all eyes will be on the field — and possibly the owner’s box — as signs point to a new chapter beginning for the club.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Chisholm ejected for arguing called 3rd strike during Yankees' 6-3 win over Rays
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Jazz Chisholm Jr. was ejected from the New York Yankees' 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays on Thursday night, then appeared to violate Major League Baseball's social media policy when he posted in-game criticism online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NFL Draft is one week away; 49ers, Raiders eye top-valued picks
item.description: The 2025 NFL Draft begins on April 24 and the San Francisco 49ers and the Las Vegas Raiders both have a good shot at snagging top-10 valued talent.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, KRON4

item.title: Ski great Brignone's first aim is to walk before thinking of next year's Olympics
item.description: Brignone was discharged from the hospital only last Tuesday, five days after breaking multiple bones in her left leg and tearing her ACL in a giant slalom crash.
item.dc:creator: KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Roman Reigns' Hollywood aspirations 'nothing new,' Paul Heyman says, as WWE star reveals career plans
item.description: Roman Reigns' own wiseman, Paul Heyman, talked to Fox News Digital about the WWE star's Hollywood goals after his revelation in Vanity Fair Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aaron Donald gets restraining order against woman he says stalks him and thinks they're married: reports
item.description: Three-time Defensive Player of the Year Aaron Donald has reportedly been granted a restraining order against a woman he says believes they are married.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: TJ Edwards signs extension with the Bears
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed linebacker TJ Edwards to a two-year, $20 million extension, with $16.6 million in guaranteed money, following the extension of defensive back Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Inside Jackalopes' new identity: Humpback Chubs
item.description: On Wednesdays this summer, the Jackalopes will be the Grand Junction Humpback Chubs. A new identity for Grand Junction’s baseball team is here.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Golden State Warriors warn fans of counterfeit playoff tickets
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors narrowly clinched a spot in the 2025 NBA Playoffs after a home win Tuesday night against the Memphis Grizzlies. Scammers, the team warned in a new advisory, are also looking to win big by selling fans counterfeit tickets.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Warriors edge Grizzlies in Play-In Tournament thriller, clinch playoff spot
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are officially going to the 2025 NBA Playoffs after a nail-biting 119-116 win over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night in San Francisco. The victory sets Golden State (48-34) up with a first-round matchup against the No.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Tyler Soderstrom hits a pair of 3-run home runs and the Athletics beat the White Sox 12-3
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyler Soderstrom hit a pair of three-run home runs, his major league-leading seventh and eighth homers of the season, and the Athletics beat the Chicago White Sox 12-3 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Frank Nazar scores 48 seconds into OT to give the Blackhawks a 4-3 win over the Senators
item.description: Frank Nazar scored 48 seconds into overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory over the Ottawa Senators on Tuesday night in their season finale.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs demote Shaw, Pearson to minors, call up Little, Palencia
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have demoted infield prospect Matt Shaw and relief pitcher Nate Pearson to Triple-A and recalled pitchers Luke Little and Daniel Palencia from the Iowa Cubs, while reinstating Vidal Bruján and moving relief pitcher Eli Morgan to the 15-day IL with a right elbow impingement.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Hendricks plans to come back stronger than ever
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This was supposed to be the season Taylor Hendricks took a big step forward. After showing promising signs his rookie year, in which he averaged 7.3 points in 40 games, Hendricks was excited to be a big part of the Jazz rebuild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Professional soccer could be headed to the North Bay
item.description: (KRON) -- The next professional sports team in the Bay Area could be bound for the North Bay. The City of Santa Rosa announced it has entered into exclusive negotiations with the United Soccer League (USL) to explore the possibilities of bringing both a men's team and a women's team to the city.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks prospect Ryan Greene makes his NHL debut at Montreal
item.description: Ryan Greene made his NHL debut with the Chicago Blackhawks on Monday night, playing 13 minutes in a 4-3 shootout win at Montreal, and is expected to play in their final game of the season at Ottawa on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hear from Masters champion Rory McIlroy and longtime friend Tony Finau
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) -- Rory McIlroy won the Masters yesterday to become the sixth player to complete the career Grand Slam. It was a long time coming for the Irishman -- and nobody was happier for him than Tony Finau, who has known McIlrory for a long time. "It's quite cool.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls get ready for NBA play-in game with 122-102 win over 76ers in regular-season finale
item.description: Kevin Huerter hit five 3-pointers and scored 18 points and the Chicago Bulls warmed-up for the play-in game with a 122-102 win over the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs' Justin Steele to undergo elbow surgery, done for the season
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs were dealt a heavy blow on the injury front Sunday evening. All-Star starting pitcher Justin Steele is done for the season, according to the Chicago Sun-Times.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Garrett Crochet dazzles in return to South Side, takes no-no into the 8th in Red Sox victory
item.description: Garrett Crochet returned to the South Side with a vengeance, throwing seven and one-third innings and striking out eleven, but the Red Sox won the game 3-1 to avoid a sweep.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: RSL loses to Nashville on late penalty kick, 2-1
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) - Sam Surridge scored on a penalty kick in the first minute of second-half stoppage time to rally Nashville SC to a 2-1 victory over Real Salt Lake on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Western Michigan wins its 1st Frozen Four hockey title, beating Boston University 6-2
item.description: Owen Michaels didn’t hesitate after watching his shot slide into the open net with more than two minutes left to essentially seal Western Michigan’s first Frozen Four title in its first championship game.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Julian Phillips scores a career-high 23 points and Bulls rout Wizards 119-89
item.description: Julian Phillips scored a career-high 23 points on 7-of-9 shooting, Nikola Vucevic finished with 15 points, 12 rebounds and eight assists and the Chicago Bulls beat the Washington Wizards 119-89 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
